build.//buildCommand: Three concerns this command threads: (1) `npm install` not `ci` because Railpack mounts /app/node_modules/.cache and ci's wipe-first strategy EBUSYs the mount. (2) Peer-dep tolerance via the .npmrc in this dir (@nestjs/apollo lags @nestjs/common). (3) --include=dev because Railway sets NODE_ENV=production at the service level, which makes `npm install` skip devDependencies by default; without it, prisma + nest CLI + build-time codegen aren't on disk and the build fails immediately.
build.buildCommand: npm install --no-audit --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
build.//: watchPatterns are evaluated relative to the repo root. Limiting to HOA-API/** stops sibling-app changes (HOA-ENTERPRISE, HOA-RESIDENTS, HOA-MARKETING) from triggering an API redeploy.

deploy.//: Push schema before booting so a fresh deploy never crashes against an out-of-date DB. `db push --accept-data-loss` is the right call here because Prisma migrations aren't checked in — the schema file is the source of truth.
deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && node dist/main
